title: 2PCS Extra Large Titanium Chopping Board, 2025 New Multifunctional Stainless Steel Chopping Boards, Double-Sided Food Grade Titanium Cutting Board Metal Chop Board for Kitchens(39x28cm, 34x23cm)
features: 【2 Different Sizes】Dhnvcud Titanium Cutting Board set contains 2 sizes: 39x28cm, 34x23cm, thickness increased to 1.2 mm, provides a wide range of sizes for your cutting needs. Both sides can be used, the front side for cutting fruits and vegetables and the back side for cutting meat to avoid using each other

【High-Quality Materials】Our chopping board is made of sturdy stainless steel titanium alloy, not easily deformed, resists stains and odors no residue, easy to clean, is reusable and has a long service life

【Healthier and Safer】Titanium chopping board compared to conventional plastic and wood, titanium chopping board no chemicals or residues are released, thus maintaining the purity of the food and protecting your health

【Gentle on Knives】The surface of the cutting board is coated with titanium and its metal hardness is softer than that of knives., this board helps maintain the sharpness of your blades, extending their lifespan, Enjoy seamless cutting without worrying about dulling your knives.

【Has Many Uses】Ideal for chopping, dicing, rolling dough, kneading bread, sandwich preparation and much more and is suitable for versatile cooking tasks. ( Don't forget to peel off the white plastic protective sheet before using them )
